description: ol-return-in-comprehension (issue #114): a `stop` inside a `map` comprehension body is routed to this same code with `keyword:"stop"`, so any control-flow escape out of a comprehension is one diagnostic family. (Spec note: error-model.md/execution-model.md name only return/output/op for this code and are silent on `stop`-in-comprehension; issue #114 requires routing `stop` here rather than to `ol-stop-outside-proc`.) `:nums` is declared first to isolate the code.
